title: exp_070 -- Larger Network + Extended Training (14400s)
hypothesis: exp_069 (2x128) peaked at 52.39 at iter 650/848 (still climbing). Doubling budget to 14400s gives the larger network time to converge. Single change from exp_069: budget 7200 to 14400.
what_to_change: Increase budget_seconds from 7200 to 14400, keeping all other exp_069 settings.
expected_outcome: If capacity + training time is the key, deterministic gates should improve further. If gates plateau despite higher reward, something else is limiting.
